question_text: Let P = and Q = . Then the value of trace(P 5 + Q4) equals:
solution:
Step 1: Trace of a Matrix
Recall that the trace of a matrix is the sum of its diagonal elements. The trace function is
linear, so:
trace(P 5 + Q4) = trace(P 5) + trace(Q4).
Step 2: Calculating trace(P 5)

The trace of P 5 is the sum of the diagonal elements:
trace(P 5) = 119 + 119 = 238.
